headline: Taylor Farms pulls iceberg lettuce from the US market after cyclosporiasis outbreak
summary: Taylor Farms issues a voluntary recall of iceberg lettuce. The recall is linked to a cyclospora outbreak. Customers like Taco Bell and Sysco were advised to pull product.

headline: Shark's versatile ChillPill cooling system is back to its best price
summary: Shark's versatile ChillPill cooling system is back at its lowest price. This device combines a portable fan with an evaporative mister. It offers an easy and effective way to beat the summer heat.

headline: TikTok is testing an AI likeness detection tool
summary: TikTok is testing an opt-in tool for AI likeness detection. The feature allows creators to report unauthorized AI-generated content. It's currently in trials with some US creators, mirroring YouTube's efforts.

headline: Pebble founder Eric Migicovsky says his 30-day warranty is all about trust
summary: Pebble founder Eric Migicovsky defends their 30-day warranty policy. He emphasizes that customer trust in the company is paramount. Buyers should understand the terms and rely on Pebble to resolve issues.

headline: Colman Domingo and Robert O’Hara in Talks to Write Live-Action Princess and the Frog Tiana Spinoff Movie
summary: Colman Domingo and Robert O’Hara are negotiating to write a new film. The project is a live-action Princess and the Frog Tiana spinoff movie. It will center on the beloved Disney princess, Tiana Rogers.

headline: The LEGO Exclusive Dungeons and Dragons Set Has Sold Out Just Days Before It Retires Forever
summary: The exclusive LEGO Dungeons and Dragons set has completely sold out. This happened just days before its scheduled retirement. Fans rushed to acquire the limited-edition collectible.

headline: The Best Christopher Nolan Movies Ranked
summary: A comprehensive ranking of Christopher Nolan's filmography is available. The list covers every movie, from 'Following' to 'The Odyssey'. Discover where your favorite Nolan film stands from worst to best.

headline: Save $400 Off the Skytech Shadow RTX 5060 Ti 16GB Gaming PC, Now Just $1,500
summary: Save $400 on the Skytech Shadow RTX 5060 Ti 16GB Gaming PC. The powerful prebuilt system is now available for just $1,500. It offers excellent performance for 1080p and 1440p gaming.

headline: US strikes hit Iran for seventh consecutive night
summary: US forces have conducted strikes in Iran for the seventh consecutive night. The operations aim to degrade Iran's armed forces capabilities. Reports indicate explosions near the critical Strait of Hormuz.

headline: Burnham finalising cabinet ahead of becoming PM on Monday
summary: Labour leader Burnham is finalizing his cabinet appointments. He is scheduled to become Prime Minister this coming Monday. Burnham vows to deliver the most significant political change in 40 years.

headline: Labour pins hopes on Burnham reboot as he plans policy blitz
summary: Labour is banking on new leader Burnham to revitalize the party. Burnham plans a rapid policy blitz to redefine Labour's agenda. Party strategists believe he can re-establish Labour's political relevance.

headline: White House defends Argentina team over Falklands banner
summary: The White House has defended the Argentina team's Falklands banner display. This stance could intensify the diplomatic dispute over the incident. Downing Street previously urged FIFA to launch an investigation.
